title: Streaming Metrics Collection Flow
mxbean_interface_hierarchy: ChangeEventSourceMetricsMXBean (lastEvent, millisSinceLastEvent, totalEventsSeen, filteredEvents, queueCapacity, queueSizeBytes)
StreamingChangeEventSourceMetricsMXBean extends ChangeEventSourceMetricsMXBean (isConnected, sourceEventPosition, millisBehindSource, numberOfCommittedTransactions, lastTransactionId)

BinlogStreamingChangeEventSourceMetricsMXBean extends StreamingChangeEventSourceMetricsMXBean (binlogFilename, binlogPosition, gtidSet, numberOfSkippedEvents, numberOfDisconnects, committedTxns, rolledBackTxns, notWellFormedTxns, largeTxns, isGtidModeEnabled)

SnapshotChangeEventSourceMetricsMXBean extends ChangeEventSourceMetricsMXBean (totalTableCount, remainingTableCount, snapshotRunning, snapshotCompleted, snapshotAborted, snapshotDurationSeconds, rowsScanned, chunkId/From/To)

OracleCommonStreamingChangeEventSourceMetricsMXBean (numberOfCommittedTransactions, lastCapturedDmlCount, maxCapturedDmlCount, totalCapturedDmlCount, warningCount, errorCount, schemaChangeParseErrorCount)

LogMinerStreamingChangeEventSourceMetricsMXBean extends OracleCommonStreamingChangeEventSourceMetricsMXBean (currentScn, offsetScn, committedScn, oldestScn, oldestScnAgeMs, currentLogFiles, minedLogFiles, batchSize, minedLogCounts, miningSessionBounds, fetchBounds, redoLogStatuses, logSwitchCount, totalProcessedRows, activeTransactions, rolledBackTransactions, oversizedTransactions, totalChanges, fetchQueryCount, scnFreezeCount, duration histograms for fetchQuery/batchProcessing/commit/miningSessionStartup/parse/resultSetNext, lagFromSource, UGA/PGA memory, abandonedTxIds, rolledBackTxIds, bufferedEvents)
binlog_streaming_event_update_flow: BinlogEventReader → metrics.onEvent(partition, source, offset, key, value, operation)
DefaultStreamingChangeEventSourceMetrics.onEvent() → super (PipelineMetrics.onEvent()) → commonEventMeter.onEvent(source, offset, key, value, operation)
DefaultStreamingChangeEventSourceMetrics.onEvent() → streamingMeter.onEvent(source, offset, key, value) [updates sourceEventPosition, millisBehindSource, lastTransactionId]
BinaryLogClient (live) ← metrics.isConnected(), getBinlogFilename(), getBinlogPosition(), getGtidSet() [read-only delegation]
BinaryLogClientStatistics ← metrics.getLastEvent(), getMilliSecondsSinceLastEvent(), getTotalNumberOfEventsSeen(), getNumberOfSkippedEvents(), getNumberOfDisconnects() [delegation to stats object]
metrics.reset() → stats.reset() + zeroes all AtomicLong/AtomicBoolean fields
logminer_streaming_event_update_flow: LogMinerEventProcessor → metrics.setCurrentScn(Scn) [current DB SCN each iteration]
LogMinerEventProcessor → metrics.setOldestScnDetails(Scn, Instant) [oldest buffered transaction SCN + timestamp]
LogMinerEventProcessor → metrics.setSwitchCount(int) [log switches in last day]
metrics.reset() → super.reset() + zeroes all AtomicLong fields + resets all DurationHistogramMetric + LRUSets
binlog_snapshot_event_update_flow: getTotalNumberOfEventsSeen() = sum of rowsScanned.values() [overridden from base PipelineMetrics]
key_composed_objects: BinlogStreamingChangeEventSourceMetrics composes: BinaryLogClient (connection state + position), BinaryLogClientStatistics (event stats delegate)
DefaultStreamingChangeEventSourceMetrics composes: StreamingMeter (sourceEventPosition, lag, capturedTables), ConnectionMeter (isConnected), ActivityMonitoringMeter (per-operation counts)
DefaultSnapshotChangeEventSourceMetrics composes: SnapshotMeter (snapshot state, rows scanned, chunk progress)
PipelineMetrics composes: CommonEventMeter (lastEvent, millisSinceLastEvent, totalEventsSeen, filteredEvents), ChangeEventQueueMetrics (queue capacity/size)

LogMinerStreamingChangeEventSourceMetrics composes: BatchMetrics (per-mining-iteration aggregation), DurationHistogramMetric x7 (min/max/last/total durations), MaxLongValueMetric x2 (UGA/PGA memory), LRUSet x2 (abandoned/rolledback txId tracking, capacity=10)
duration_histogram_metrics_in_logminer: batchProcessingDuration: total processing of last LogMiner query result-set
fetchQueryDuration: time to execute each LogMiner SQL query
lagFromSourceDuration: lag between DB change time and connector processing
miningSessionStartupDuration: time to start/load data dictionary for each mining session
scn_tracking_in_logminer: currentScn: database's current SCN from each query
offsetScn: low-watermark (scn attribute in offset) — restart point
oldestScn: oldest SCN in transaction buffer (in-flight transactions)
miningSessionScnRange: [lowerBounds, upperBounds] of current mining session
miningFetchScnRange: [lowerBounds, upperBounds] of current redo log fetch
key_relationships: PipelineMetrics extends Metrics, implements DataChangeEventListener, ChangeEventSourceMetricsMXBean
Metrics owns ObjectName and delegates register/unregister to JmxUtils → MBeanServer
LogMinerStreamingChangeEventSourceMetrics owns BatchMetrics (inner class) for per-iteration aggregation before flush
important_notes: All metrics classes are @ThreadSafe using AtomicLong/AtomicReference/AtomicBoolean fields
Binlog streaming delegates real-time position/connection state to BinaryLogClient directly (not cached)
LogMiner lag is calculated by comparing DB change time (adjusted for timezone offset) against connector clock
BatchMetrics.updateStreamingMetrics() is the flush point that synchronizes per-batch counters into the main metrics object at end of each mining iteration
JMX context name: 'streaming' for streaming metrics, 'snapshot' for snapshot metrics (set in super constructor call)
BinaryLogClientStatistics is a separate JMX-aware wrapper around BinaryLogClient provided by mysql-binlog-connector library
reset() is synchronized via atomic operations; called on connector restart or explicit JMX reset
LogMiner uses DurationHistogramMetric inner class tracking min/max/last/total for 7 different duration measurements
LRUSet (capacity=10) tracks most recent abandoned and rolled-back transaction IDs for JMX exposure
